body:value: The data refers to the observation of the investigator about cleanliness of toilet (% AWC). It was observed that the maximum number of Very clean toilets of the AWC were in Kerala (58.8%) while the least number of Very clean toilets were found in Punjab (0%) and Bihar (0.4%). Also, the maximum percentage of unclean/unhygienic toilets were found in Bihar (94.8%).
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Health
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Health
title: Observation of the Investigator about Cleanliness of Toilet (% AWC)

body:value: The data refers to information on the occupation of beneficiary children's parents. The occupations of parents have been grouped into four categories - Cultivation/Allied Agricultural Activity, Agricultural/Other Labour, Household Industry/trade/Business and Service/ Others. The outcome is based on the sample survey undertaken by Programme Evaluation Organisation (PEO), Planning commission which covered 48 districts and 480 schools across 17 states of India for 'Performance Evaluation Report of Cooked Mid-Day Meal (CMDM), 2010'. The reference period for the study was 2000 to 2006.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Education
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Education
Elementary
title: Occupation of Beneficiary Children Parents - Based on Sample Survey

body:value: INCOIS, being the central repository for marine data in the country, receives voluminous oceanographic data in real time, from a variety of in-situ and remote sensing observing systems. The Ocean Information Bank provides information on physical, chemical, biological and geological parameters of ocean and coasts on spatial and temporal domains that is vital for both research and operational oceanography. The Ocean Information Bank is supported by the data received from Ocean Observing Systems in the Indian Ocean (both the in-situ platforms and satellites) as well as by a chain of Marine Data Centres.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Earth Sciences
Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services (INCOIS)
field_sector:name: Science and Technology
Coastal & Island
Marine Science
title: Ocean Data and Information System

body:value: The data refers to year-wise outlay and expenditure under IDDP (Intensive Dairy Development Programme) Scheme for the year. This scheme was launched in 1993-94 on 100% grant-in-aid basis. The main objectives of the scheme are developing milch cattle, increasing milk production by providing technical input services, creating infrastructure to improve procurement, processing and marketing of milk in a cost effective manner, ensuring remunerative prices to the milk producers, by strengthening dairy cooperative societies at village level, generate additional employment opportunities, improving social, nutritional and economic status of residents of comparatively disadvantaged areas. The funds are released directly to the implementing agency i.e State Dairy Federation/District Milk Union.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Dairying Scheme
field_ministry_department:name: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying
Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
field_sector:name: Agriculture
Dairying
title: Outlay and Expenditure under IDDP Scheme

body:value: The data refers to country-wise daily details on overseas citizenship. The Constitution of India does not allow holding Indian citizenship and Citizenship of a foreign country simultaneously. Based on the recommendation of the High Level committee on Indian Diaspora, the Government of India decided to grant Overseas Citizenship of India (OCI). Persons of Indian Origin (PIOs) of certain category as has been specified in the Section 7A of the Citizenship Act, 1955 are eligible for registration as OCI.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Citizenship
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Home Affairs
Department of Home
field_sector:name: Foreign Affairs
Visa
title: Overseas Citizenship of India (OCI) Details by Country/ Mission
